name: Goblin Ambush — Old Forest Road
dmNotes: Krag flees at half HP. Stealth DC 13 to spot the snare line before it springs.
scriptText: The road narrows beneath ancient oaks, their branches knitting out the last of the daylight. Birdsong thins, then stops entirely. {{music:combat}} Shapes drop from the canopy — {{sfx:shriek}} — and a snarling voice cries out from the brush: "Take the fat one alive!" {{image:art/krag.svg}} Steel rings against steel as the first goblin lunges. {{sfx:sword}}
